eval: lean-vs-orig supergoal harness A/B on DeepSWE difficult suite

eval_intent.goal: Does the LEAN delivery core (Plan+Build -> Exact Verify/QA with verdict-gated R-LOOP fix loop, max 3 iterations) keep task accuracy while cutting CLI passes/tokens vs the ORIG core (Build -> Improve full spec -> Improve edge cases -> Final Verify)?
constraints: low-tier external CLI (codex) so harness differences are visible
role prompts derived from each arm's shipped skill files
tradeoffs: n=1 per task: directional only, never proven
ruled_out: baseline (no-harness) arm - out of scope for this run
Pier/docker verifier - replicated locally with repo-owned grader + verbatim test commands (recorded)

orig.note: parent-defined 4-pass core = shipped 'historical contract string'; shipped file at 295992a also lists Mandatory Adversarial Review as a separate mandatory pass - folded into Final Verify per the parent arm spec + the historical contract string; recorded as deviation

runtime.model_requested: gpt-code-5.6-luna (rejected: not supported on ChatGPT account)

stop_policy.manual_transient_retry: at most one, only for clearly transient non-timeout crash (rate limit/stream error), recorded

task.suite: deepswe forced default difficult suite (primary scoring task)

command_manifest.note: repo-owned grader.py + config.json f2p/p2p whitelists byte-identical; go test invocations mirrored verbatim from tests/test.sh; env-dir overrides documented by grader.py

token_time_capture.tokens: codex --json turn.completed usage (last event), parsed by shipped harness-eval-runner.mjs codex adapter; raw JSONL not persisted by the shipped adapter (recorded limitation)

deviations: first attempt aborted: detached background pipeline was terminated when the conductor's turn ended; ORIG pass 1 partial work discarded (runs/etree-aborted-firstattempt/), both fixtures reset, restart from pass 1. Tokens spent by the killed pass are unrecorded overhead.
per-pass hard timeout lowered 900s -> 540s (foreground tool-call ceiling 600s); declared before the restarted run
runner auto-retry disabled (SG_RETRIES=0) because a timeout+retry cannot fit the foreground window; manual transient-retry policy recorded in stop_policy
adapter preflight not re-spent per pass: codex-exec preflight passed on this host this session (selectAdapter 'edit ok, tests pass' at 2026-07-14T13:19:34Z + manual model preflight); recorded here
model substitution: requested 'gpt code 5.6 luna' id gpt-code-5.6-luna rejected on ChatGPT auth (400); closest available codex model gpt-5.6-luna used at medium effort (models_cache enumeration)
